source_pr.title: plan: fix cost calculate bug.
source_pr.body:
When we calculate record counts for table scan, we didn't consider equal conditions.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala PTAL

symptoms: queryStr := `select c2 from t where c1 in ('7', '10', '112', '111', '98', '106', '100', '9', '18', '17') order by c2` (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: queryStr := `select c2 from t where c1 in ('7', '10', '112', '111', '98', '106', '100', '9', '18', '17') order by c2` (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: queryStr := `select c2 from t where c1 in ('7', '10', '112', '111', '98', '106', '100', '9', '18', '17') order by c2` (executor/executor_test.go)
files: executor/executor_test.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/plan_test.go, plan/statistics/statistics.go, plan/statistics/statistics_test.go
